name: Beans Greens
recipeIngredient: 1 cup FRESH butterbeans (limas or black-eyed peas would work too)
1-2 fresh hot peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the white wine into a pressure cooker.
2. Add the rinsed beans, bay leaves, and enough water to cover the ingredients.
3. Place the heat on medium to medium high and do not cover the pot yet.
4. Let the beans simmer as you prepare the greens: rinse each leaf, remove the veins, stack them flat, roll tightly, and shred across the roll.
5. Add the chopped onions to the beans and cook until just translucent.
6. Add the shredded collard greens and hot peppers, mixing well.
7. Place the lid on the pressure cooker and bring it up to pressure.
8. Cook at pressure for about 3 minutes.
9. Turn off the heat and allow the cooker to cool under cold water.
10. Serve the beans and greens with your favorite vinegar (such as apple cider, balsamic, or rice).
